summary: Verified navbar text color toggle at scroll=0 vs scroll=400 on home page, and verified backend product specs for arched-picture-frame. All checks passed.
passed: GET /api/products returns arched-picture-frame with specs ['Red oak frame','Walnut peg accents','Hand-finished'] and NO 'Steam-bent arch'
At scroll=0 on /, logo 'Oak & Iron' computed color = rgb(249, 246, 240) (cream)
At scroll=0 on /, HOME / PORTFOLIO / CONTACT links all rgb(249, 246, 240) (cream)
At scroll=400 on /, logo computed color = rgb(44, 42, 40) (dark)
At scroll=400 on /, HOME / PORTFOLIO / CONTACT links all rgb(44, 42, 40) (dark)
At scroll=400 the nav has cream backdrop: backgroundColor rgba(249,246,240,0.85), backdrop-filter blur(24px)
